mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_LOCF_AMORTIZATION_DTL.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LOCF_AMORTIZATION_DTL ( AMORTIZATION_DTL_ID, BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NO, INSTALLMENT_NO, PAYMENT_DATE, OPENING_PRINCIPAL_BAL, OPENING_CARRYING_AMT, SCHEDULED_PAYMENT_AMT, SCHEDULED_PRINCIPAL_AMT, SCHEDULED_INTEREST_AMT, EFFECTIVE_INTEREST_REVENUE, FEE_AMORTIZATION_AMT, COST_AMORTIZATION_AMT, NET_AMORTIZATION_AMT, CLOSING_PRINCIPAL_BAL, CLOSING_CARRYING_AMT ) VALUES ( #{amortizationDtlId}, #{batchExecutionId}, #{contractId}, #{contractNo}, #{installmentNo}, #{paymentDate}, #{openingPrincipalBal}, #{openingCarryingAmt}, #{scheduledPaymentAmt}, #{scheduledPrincipalAmt}, #{scheduledInterestAmt}, #{effectiveInterestRevenue}, #{feeAmortizationAmt}, #{costAmortizationAmt}, #{netAmortizationAmt}, #{closingPrincipalBal}, #{closingCarryingAmt} )

SELECT SQ_LOCF_RESULT_HDR.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LOCF_RESULT_HDR ( RESULT_HDR_ID, BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, BASE_DATE, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRINCIPAL_AMT, INITIAL_CARRYING_AMOUNT, ANNUAL_EIR, FINAL_CARRYING_AMOUNT, TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_INTEREST_REV, TOTAL_FEE_AMORTIZATION_AMT, TOTAL_COST_AMORTIZATION_AMT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{resultHdrId}, #{batchExecutionId}, #{baseDate}, #{contractId}, #{contractNo}, #{customerId}, #{productCode}, #{principalAmt}, #{initialCarryingAmount}, #{annualEir}, #{finalCarryingAmount}, #{totalEffectiveInterestRev}, #{totalFeeAmortizationAmt}, #{totalCostAmortizationAmt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO LOCF_RESULT_SUMMARY ( SUMMARY_ID, BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, BASE_DATE, PRODUCT_CODE, CONTRACT_COUNT, TOTAL_INITIAL_CARRYING_AMT, TOTAL_FINAL_CARRYING_AMT, TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_INTEREST_REV, CREATED_AT ) SELECT SQ_LOCF_RESULT_SUMMARY.NEXTVAL, summary_rows.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, summary_rows.BASE_DATE, summary_rows.PRODUCT_CODE, summary_rows.CONTRACT_COUNT, summary_rows.TOTAL_INITIAL_CARRYING_AMT, summary_rows.TOTAL_FINAL_CARRYING_AMT, summary_rows.TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_INTEREST_REV, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM ( SELECT h.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, h.BASE_DATE, h.PRODUCT_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CONTRACT_COUNT, SUM(h.INITIAL_CARRYING_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_INITIAL_CARRYING_AMT, SUM(h.FINAL_CARRYING_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_FINAL_CARRYING_AMT, SUM(h.TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_INTEREST_REV) AS TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_INTEREST_REV FROM LOCF_RESULT_HDR h WHERE h.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = #{batchExecutionId} GROUP BY h.BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, h.BASE_DATE, h.PRODUCT_CODE ) summary_rows
